title: Session 02 — Looking for a Healer
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Soni sent the party to "the lady at the end of the cave"; G drew directions and flagged Felson for training; loaded dreams at the fishing hole, then a bird disassembled into "Welcome" at Ms. Judy's walkway.**

# What happened
- At the overwhelmed Clinic, **[[soni|Soni]]** told the party the sickness — not the quake — is the real threat: proximity spreads and accelerates it, and [[koviz]] can't heal it in time. She sent them to **"the lady at the end of the cave."**
- On the way, **[[giuseppe|G]]** (helping the injured) drew them directions — he clearly knows [[ms-judy]] ("she will help you as long as you don't break her trust") — and told [[pc-felson|Felson]] he needs training, and that they'd talk later.
- They rested at a hidden fishing hole (Felson noticed something watching [[pc-varen|Varen]]).
- **Dreams:** Varen — the guiding orb, something chasing, first meeting [[pc-eddy|Eddy]], "the eyes no man has." Eddy — [[shipton]], his sister, his father's cold face, [[the-pool|the pool]], the unfinished symbol, dying by pitchfork.
- Eddy then cast disease removal on the party.
- Following a trail of blood, they found a **bird disassembled into the word "Welcome"** at Ms. Judy's walkway.

# Fired / left smoking
- Something was watching Varen at the fishing hole.
- G's promised talk with Felson — "they'd talk later."

# Threads
[[ms-judy]] · [[soni]] · [[giuseppe]] · [[the-pool]]
